title: Prefer ripgrep before falling back to grep

hypothesis.statement: The user repeatedly corrects a plain `grep` search to `rg`, so applying the rule first prevents the correction.
hypothesis.expected_result: Matching sessions use `rg` before searching and no longer require the same user correction.
failure_cases: The user can intentionally want plain grep for a portable script.

exclusions: Do not intervene when the user explicitly overrides this rule for the current task.

intervention.instruction: Before searching the tree, apply this explicit user-authored rule: prefer rg over grep.
